title: poa ferreyrae
intro: Poa ferreyrae, also known as Queñua grass, is a species of grass native to the Andes mountains in South America. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Poa ferreyrae include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
